gen_ai_workflow_efficiency.label: Used generative AI in a project to improve workflow efficiency

items.title: Customer Feedback Review Project
items.summary: Used generative AI to streamline drafting and review steps in a customer feedback review project.
bullets: Used generative AI to speed up first-pass review of customer feedback comments before final manual checks.
Reduced repetitive drafting time and delivered weekly reporting summaries more efficiently.
